finding_results.notes: Marcus's voicemail now registers Rosa's post-dissolution consequence directly on the page by tying his renewed route to her landing in the county ER after stretching medication.
Burt's opening placement now uses a decline-specific image tied to his present physical state instead of repeating the established wispy-hair and musician-hands inventory.
The redundant inhale and hallway modifiers were stripped back so the chapter keeps the diagnostic exam description and one pared ambient cough beat without re-describing the condition multiple times.

summary: Resolved all packet findings in place: added one explicit buyer consequence through Marcus's voicemail, replaced Burt's recycled physical inventory with a new deterioration image, and reduced Earl's cough treatment to the medical exam plus one minimal atmospheric mention.
